content.cn_text: 现在请翻到第3页第二部分。
content.en_text: Now turn to section 2 on page 3.

content.cn_text: 第二部分。你将听到一位电台播音员介绍
content.en_text: Section 2 You will hear a radio announcer describing

content.cn_text: 新西兰一座名叫 Gisborne 的城市。
content.en_text: a city in New Zealand called Gisborne.

content.cn_text: 首先，你有一些时间查看第3页的第11至第16题。
content.en_text: First, you have some time to look at questions 11 to 16 on page 3.

content.cn_text: 现在请仔细听，并回答第11至第16题。
content.en_text: Now listen carefully and answer questions 11 to 16.

content.cn_text: 各位听众，大家好。
content.en_text: Greetings all you listeners out there.

content.cn_text: 这里是国家广播电台，我是 Kevin Low。
content.en_text: This is National Radio and I'm Kevin Low.

content.cn_text: 今天早上，我将告诉大家这座悠闲的 Gisborne 城市有什么特别之处。
content.en_text: This morning I'm going to tell you what's so special about the laid back city of Gisborne.

content.cn_text: 你会听到一点关于它过去历史的内容，但更多会听到它如今为国内外游客提供的旅游景点。
content.en_text: You'll hear a little bit about its past in the old days and a lot about what attractions it has to offer foreign and domestic visitors today.

content.cn_text: 所以请仔细听，了解这座城市及周边地区有哪些可做的事情；这里经济繁荣，但生活方式仍保持原貌。
content.en_text: So listen up to learn more about what there is to do in this city and its surrounding region where the economy is booming but the lifestyle remains unspoiled.

content.cn_text: Gisborne 地区是毛利探险者乘坐传说中的独木舟，在约1400年前经历漫长而危险的海上航行后首次登陆新西兰的地方。
content.en_text: The Gisborne region is where the legendary canoe sailed by Maori explorers first landed in New Zealand about 1400 years ago after its long and risky voyage over the sea.

content.cn_text: 这里也是该国最东端，这正是它原名 Te Tanifiti 的由来，在毛利语中意思是“太阳从水面升起的海岸”。
content.en_text: It is also the easternmost point of the country, which is what inspired its original name Te Tanifiti, which in the Maori language means the coast where the sun rises across the waters.

content.cn_text: Gisborne 也是欧洲探险家 Captain Cook 于1769年从英国远航发现新西兰时首次登陆的地方。
content.en_text: Gisborne was also the place where the European explorer Captain Cook first landed his boat upon discovering New Zealand all the way from England back in 1769.

content.cn_text: 即使在早期，这个地区也因肥沃的土壤和亚热带气候而成为园艺中心。
content.en_text: Even in those early days this district was a centre of horticulture thanks to its fertile soil and subtropical climate.

content.cn_text: 不久之后，英国定居者到来，Gisborne 很快开始向奥克兰和惠灵顿等较大的定居点运输产品。
content.en_text: Soon after that of course the English settlers arrived and soon Gisborne was shipping its products to larger settlements such as Auckland and Wellington.

content.cn_text: 最初出口的是玉米和根茎作物，但很快扩展到来自著名 Poverty Bay 附近富饶牧区农业定居点的黄油、肉类和羊毛。
content.en_text: This began with maize and root crops but quickly expanded to butter, meat and wool from the agricultural settlements in the rich pastoral country near the famous Poverty Bay.

content.cn_text: 海边建起了码头和栈桥，为沿海贸易商服务。
content.en_text: Wharves and jetties were built beside the sea to service the coastal traders.

content.cn_text: 如今在 Gisborne 的海滩上仍能看到许多这样的木制结构。
content.en_text: Many of these wooden structures can still be seen on Gisborne beaches today.

content.cn_text: 如今 Gisborne 继续向新西兰其他地区出口新鲜农产品。
content.en_text: Today Gisborne continues to export fresh produce to other regions of New Zealand.

content.cn_text: 这些产品包括各种获奖奶酪，当然还有从当地礁石和水域手工捕捞的美味龙虾和鲷鱼。
content.en_text: These wares include various award-winning cheeses and of course the delicious lobsters and snapper fish harvested by hand from the local reefs and waters.

content.cn_text: 至于出口到亚洲市场的产品，对该地区橙子和柠檬的需求正在增加。
content.en_text: As for exports to Asian markets there's an increasing demand for the region's oranges and lemons.

content.cn_text: Gisborne 也因出产一些高品质的白葡萄和红葡萄而在国内外逐渐闻名。
content.en_text: Gisborne is also becoming well known nationally and internationally as the source of some top quality white and red grapes.

content.cn_text: 那么 Gisborne 有什么活动呢？
content.en_text: Now what's on in Gisborne?

content.cn_text: 首先是每年夏天举办的 Gisborne 年度音乐会。
content.en_text: Well first up there's the annual Gisborne concert held every summer time.

content.cn_text: 这是一次很棒的体验。音乐会在 Waiahikia 葡萄园举行，它靠近同名的传统毛利会堂。
content.en_text: This is a great experience. It's held at Waiahikia Vineyard which is near the traditional Maori Meeting House or Marae of the same name.

content.cn_text: 他们会请来钢琴演奏者和歌剧歌手，在葡萄藤之间一个类似天然露天剧场的专门舞台上表演。
content.en_text: They bring in a piano player and opera singers who perform on a purpose-built stage in a kind of natural amphitheater in the middle of the rows of grapes.

content.cn_text: 那里有极好的音乐会氛围，是一个非常棒的夜晚活动。
content.en_text: It's a fantastic concert-like atmosphere, a really good night out.

content.cn_text: 下雨天可以做什么呢？
content.en_text: What to do on a rainy day?

content.cn_text: 我建议去参观名为 The Beach 的展览，它在 Tira Fiti 博物馆的一号展厅展出。
content.en_text: I'd suggest a visit to the show called The Beach which is on in Gallery One at Tira Fiti Museum.

content.cn_text: 这是一个大型展览，因此还占用了1号展厅旁边的大厅，展览分为冲浪、露营、时尚等不同本地文化板块。
content.en_text: It's a big display so it also takes up the hall next to Gallery One and it's divided into different sections of the local culture like surfing, camping, fashion and so on.

content.cn_text: 如果你购买展览图书，里面有一些有趣的照片。
content.en_text: If you buy the book of the exhibition there are some interesting photographs in there.

content.cn_text: 在听节目的剩余部分之前，你有一些时间查看第4页的第17至第20题。
content.en_text: Before you hear the rest of the program you have some time to look at questions 17 to 20 on page 4.

content.cn_text: 现在请听，并回答第17至第20题。
content.en_text: Now listen and answer questions 17 to 20.

content.cn_text: Gisborne 还有很多其他值得看的地方。
content.en_text: There's a lot else to see in Gisborne as well.

content.cn_text: 你不应该错过 Hot Springs Reserve，那里有温暖的天然矿物池，还有可以住在灌木林中的小屋。
content.en_text: You shouldn't miss the Hot Springs Reserve which has warm natural mineral pools and little houses where you can stay amongst the bush.

content.cn_text: 由于这里非常隐蔽且私密，这个度假地最受新婚夫妇欢迎，他们常常预订小屋度蜜月。
content.en_text: Being very secluded and private, this resort is most favored by newlyweds who often book a cabin for their honeymoon.

content.cn_text: 这里的水也很有疗愈作用。据说在那里泡澡对健康有益，不过不推荐孕妇或老年人使用。
content.en_text: The water is very therapeutic too. It's apparently good for your health to bathe there, though not recommended for pregnant women or the elderly.

content.cn_text: 附近是 Mahia Peninsula，它作为毕业后大批大学生的新年前夜派对目的地而闻名。
content.en_text: Around the corner is Mahia Peninsula, legendary as a New Year's Eve party destination for large crowds of university students after their graduation.

content.cn_text: 这里的冲浪和钓鱼都很棒，也是安全的游泳和潜水地点。
content.en_text: The surfing and fishing here is excellent and it's a safe spot for swimming and diving too.

content.cn_text: 另一个适合孩子的活动是在 Motu River 上乘坐橡皮艇或喷射艇。
content.en_text: Now also good for kids is taking a raft or jet boat ride on the Motu River.

content.cn_text: 这听起来很刺激，对吧？但事实上，当地小学经常使用这项活动，他们会带大批年幼的孩子，有时一次好几个班，在学校营地期间来这里玩。
content.en_text: This sounds quite wild doesn't it? But in fact this activity is often used by local primary schools who take big groups of young children, several classes at a time out here for a bit of fun while they're on their school camp.

content.cn_text: 不需要家长陪同。你可以休息一下，因为这项活动比听起来安全得多，并且由漂流公司认真监督。
content.en_text: No parents required. You can have some time out as this activity is a lot safer than it sounds and is carefully supervised by the rafting company.

content.cn_text: 最后，别忘了 Eden Woodlands Park，它实际上是一个巨大的苗圃。
content.en_text: Finally, don't let's forget the Eden Woodlands Park which is really a huge tree nursery.

content.cn_text: 你可以在这里宁静的绿色环境中沿着各种小径步行数小时。
content.en_text: You can walk for hours here in the peaceful green surroundings along a variety of tracks.

content.cn_text: 这里甚至有一条非常好的步道，宽到足够轮椅通行，这样每个人都可以一起欣赏最美的大自然。
content.en_text: There's even a very nice walkway made wide enough for those in wheelchairs so that everyone can go along and enjoy Mother Nature at her best.

content.cn_text: 第二部分到此结束。现在你有半分钟检查答案。
content.en_text: That is the end of section 2. You now have half a minute to check your answers.

content.cn_text: 你
content.en_text: You

groups.desc: Choose the correct letter, A, B or C
groups.title: Questions 11–16

items.title: The announcer says that the main topic of today’s talk will be Gisborne’s
items.analysis: 答案解析：第11题问今天讲话的主要话题是什么。原文说会讲 a lot about what attractions it has to offer foreign and domestic visitors today，所以重点是旅游，对应 C. tourism。

items.title: The Maori name for the Gisborne region signifies
items.analysis: 答案解析：第12题问 Gisborne 地区的毛利名称表示什么。原文说 it is the easternmost point，并解释为 the coast where the sun rises across the waters，表示东海岸，所以答案是 B. east coast。

items.title: Early exports from Gisborne came from its
items.analysis: 答案解析：第13题问 Gisborne 早期出口品来自哪里。原文提到 maize and root crops，以及 butter, meat and wool from agricultural settlements，说明来自农业和农场，对应 A. farms。

items.title: According to the speaker, what does Gisborne export to Asia nowadays?
items.analysis: 答案解析：第14题问现在 Gisborne 向亚洲出口什么。原文说 exports to Asian markets 有 increasing demand for oranges and lemons，所以答案是 A. oranges and lemons。

items.title: The Gisborne Summer Concert takes place in
items.analysis: 答案解析：第15题问 Gisborne Summer Concert 在哪里举行。原文说 It's held at Waiahikia Vineyard，所以答案是 B. a vineyard。

items.title: On wet days in Gisborne the announcer recommends

options.title: A
options.content: a cultural display in the museum

options.title: B
options.content: a fashion show in the town hall

options.title: C
options.content: a photography exhibition in the art gallery

items.analysis: 答案解析：第16题问在 Gisborne 的雨天，播音员推荐什么。原文说 visit the show called The Beach at Tira Fiti Museum，并提到 local culture，所以答案是 A. a cultural display in the museum。

groups.desc: Choose FOUR answers from the box and write the correct letter, A–G, next to questions 17–20.
groups.title: Questions 17–20

items.title: Hot Springs Reserve
items.analysis: 答案解析：第17题问 Hot Springs Reserve 推荐给哪类人。原文说 most favored by newlyweds，对应 C. recently married couples。

items.title: Mahia Peninsula
items.analysis: 答案解析：第18题问 Mahia Peninsula 推荐给哪类人。原文说它是 large crowds of university students after their graduation 的派对目的地，对应 G. young adults。

items.title: Motu River Rafting
items.analysis: 答案解析：第19题问 Motu River Rafting 推荐给哪类人。原文说 local primary schools 带 young children 来参加，对应 F. young school children。

items.title: Eden Woodlands Park
items.analysis: 答案解析：第20题问 Eden Woodlands Park 推荐给哪类人。原文说 walkway made wide enough for those in wheelchairs，对应 A. disabled people。
